title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!
